message:
test(unit): expand email_notify, pane_lifecycle, resize_scheduler, screen_state inline tests; refactor ipc shutdown signal (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Inline unit test expansion across six frankenterm-core modules, continuing
the wa-1u90p.7.1 coverage campaign.

email_notify.rs (+169 lines):
- New tests for email notification configuration validation, template
  rendering edge cases, and SMTP connection parameter construction.

pane_lifecycle.rs (+436 lines):
- Comprehensive lifecycle state machine tests covering pane creation,
  attach/detach transitions, activity tracking, and cleanup sequencing.

resize_scheduler.rs (+471 lines):
- Scheduler queue management tests: enqueue/dequeue ordering, coalescing
  of rapid resize events, capacity limits, priority handling, and
  flush-on-shutdown behavior.

screen_state.rs (+169 lines):
- Screen state detection tests for alt-screen mode, cursor position
  tracking, scrollback state, and terminal mode flag combinations.

runtime_compat.rs (+16 lines):
- Two new helper tests: `mpsc_send_and_recv_option_helpers_roundtrip`
  and `mpsc_recv_option_helper_returns_none_when_closed` covering the
  mpsc_send/mpsc_recv_option convenience wrappers.

ipc.rs (refactor, -34/+9 lines):
- Simplified `shutdown_signal_pending` by replacing manual cfg-gated
  asupersync/tokio timeout blocks with a single call to the
  `runtime_compat::timeout` abstraction layer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
